name: R-10 finding includes the component name and source file per the §26 W-12 citation contract
command: mkdir -p before after && printf 'export type CardProps = { title: string; };\n' > before/Card.tsx && printf 'export type CardProps = { heading: string; };\n' > after/Card.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/component-api-drift.sh" --before before --after after 2>err.txt && grep -q 'component=Card' err.txt && grep -q 'Card.tsx' err.txt && echo cited 1>&2
